title: The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, REALLY Love You
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (12) + S2 (12) = 24. Manga ongoing in Weekly Young Jump (approx. ch. 250 / 25 volumes as of mid-2026; AniList reports null chapter count). S1 adapts ch. 1-22 (continue at Vol. 3 ch. 23); S2 adapts ch. 23-50 (continue at Vol. 7 ch. 51); zero filler. This is a gag romcom structured around introducing one soulmate at a time, so arcs are named for the girlfriend introduced. Girlfriend-intro chapters are anchored where known (Hakari ch.1, Karane ch.2, Shizuka ch.3, Kurumi ch.24, Mei ch.30, Meme ch.45) and volume boundaries (V4 24-32, V5 33-41, V6 42-50, V7 51-59); intermediate episode/chapter splits are approximate. Season 3 premiered July 2026 and is not yet mapped; post-S2 chapters are listed source-only.
